categories.label: Comfort
categories.intro: Beds, anxiety wraps, and cooling gear that actually get used — for pets who need more than a blanket on the floor.

categories.label: Daily walks
categories.intro: Harnesses, poop bags, and launchers for the part of the day most dogs live for — and most owners just want to go smoothly.

categories.label: Enrichment
categories.intro: Puzzle feeders, treat toys, and launchers that keep clever dogs (and cats) from redecorating your house out of boredom.

categories.label: Feeding
categories.intro: Automatic feeders, slow bowls, and portion tools for pets that eat too fast, too late, or from the wrong bowl.

categories.label: Grooming and home
categories.intro: Hair removers, nail grinders, and clippers so fur on the sofa is an occasional fact of life, not a permanent state.

categories.label: Health
categories.intro: Dental treats, wipes, and hygiene gear that vets tend to endorse — without the fuss of a full grooming appointment.

categories.label: Home air
categories.intro: Air purifiers that deal with pet dander and odour quietly in the background, so the house smells like a home not a kennel.

categories.label: Home monitoring
categories.intro: Cameras and smart monitors for knowing what your pet gets up to the moment you close the front door.

categories.label: Hydration
categories.intro: Fountains and water bowls that persuade cats (and dogs) to drink more without a full plumbing project.

categories.label: Hygiene
categories.intro: Litter boxes, odour control, and waste tools that make the less glamorous side of pet ownership bearable.

categories.label: Safety
categories.intro: GPS trackers, bark collars, and containment gear for pets who treat the garden boundary as a suggestion.

categories.label: Training
categories.intro: Headcollars, harnesses, and gentle training tools for dogs that still think pulling is a competitive sport.

categories.label: Travel
categories.intro: Carriers, car harnesses, and travel bowls for pets who come everywhere — and the owners who pack for them.
